'''鈭歯g-j-r''' ('''kangajar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whoomp|whoomp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whoomp|whoomp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-j-r
|-
! Lemma
| kangajar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingajar|thingajar]] || [[word:jingajar|jingajar]] || [[word:shingajar|shingajar]] || [[word:kingajar|kingajar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungajar|thuthungajar]] || [[word:jujungajar|jujungajar]] || [[word:shushungajar|shushungajar]] || [[word:kukungajar|kukungajar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungajar|thungajar]] || [[word:jungajar|jungajar]] || [[word:shungajar|shungajar]] || [[word:kungajar|kungajar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungajar|thungajar]] || [[word:jungajar|jungajar]] || [[word:shungajar|shungajar]] || [[word:kungajar|kungajar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengajar|thengajar]] || [[word:jengajar|jengajar]] || [[word:shengajar|shengajar]] || [[word:kengajar|kengajar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongajar|thothongajar]] || [[word:jojongajar|jojongajar]] || [[word:shoshongajar|shoshongajar]] || [[word:kokongajar|kokongajar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongajar|thongajar]] || [[word:jongajar|jongajar]] || [[word:shongajar|shongajar]] || [[word:kongajar|kongajar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongajar|thongajar]] || [[word:jongajar|jongajar]] || [[word:shongajar|shongajar]] || [[word:kongajar|kongajar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngajar|th忙ngajar]] || [[word:j忙ngajar|j忙ngajar]] || [[word:sh忙ngajar|sh忙ngajar]] || [[word:k忙ngajar|k忙ngajar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangajar|thathangajar]] || [[word:jajangajar|jajangajar]] || [[word:shashangajar|shashangajar]] || [[word:kakangajar|kakangajar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangajar|thangajar]] || [[word:jangajar|jangajar]] || [[word:shangajar|shangajar]] || [[word:kangajar|kangajar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangajar|thangajar]] || [[word:jangajar|jangajar]] || [[word:shangajar|shangajar]] || [[word:kangajar|kangajar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangajar|shangajar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangajar|goshangajar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangajar|gokishangajar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangajarn眉|shangajarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangajarnkn眉|goshangajarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangajarn眉|gokishangajarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangajarsh毛|shangajarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangajarnksh毛|goshangajarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangajarsh毛|gokishangajarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangajaro|shangajaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangajarnkro|goshangajarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangajaro|gokishangajaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangajarmu|shangajarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangajarnkmu|goshangajarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangajarmu|gokishangajarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangajarsher|shangajarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangajarnksher|goshangajarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangajarsher|gokishangajarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangajarng|shangajarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangajarnkng|goshangajarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangajarng|gokishangajarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangajarya|shangajarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangajarnkya|goshangajarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangajarya|gokishangajarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangajaryam|shangajaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangajarnkyam|goshangajarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangajaryam|gokishangajaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangajarn眉sh毛|shangajarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangajarnkn眉sh毛|goshangajarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangajarn眉sh毛|gokishangajarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangajarn眉ro|shangajarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangajarnkn眉ro|goshangajarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangajarn眉ro|gokishangajarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangajarn眉mu|shangajarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangajarnkn眉mu|goshangajarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangajarn眉mu|gokishangajarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangajarsh毛n眉|shangajarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangajarnksh毛n眉|goshangajarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangajarsh毛n眉|gokishangajarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangajarsh毛ro|shangajarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangajarnksh毛ro|goshangajarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangajarsh毛ro|gokishangajarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangajarsh毛mu|shangajarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangajarnksh毛mu|goshangajarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangajarsh毛mu|gokishangajarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangajaron眉|shangajaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangajarnkron眉|goshangajarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangajaron眉|gokishangajaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangajarosh毛|shangajarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangajarnkrosh毛|goshangajarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangajarosh毛|gokishangajarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangajaromu|shangajaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangajarnkromu|goshangajarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangajaromu|gokishangajaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangajarmun眉|shangajarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangajarnkmun眉|goshangajarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangajarmun眉|gokishangajarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangajarmush毛|shangajarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangajarnkmush毛|goshangajarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangajarmush毛|gokishangajarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangajarmuro|shangajarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangajarnkmuro|goshangajarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangajarmuro|gokishangajarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
